name: ext-revoke
_note: MUTATING. DELETE → 204 No Content, EMPTY body (controller @HttpCode(204), returns void). The comparator treats two empty bodies as parity. OPERATOR: substitute a real token id from ext_mint/ext_list into the path; run LAST since it revokes that row. Node's revoke is idempotent (UPDATE ... WHERE id=AND user_id=; revoking an unknown/foreign id is a no-op that still 204s) so a wrong id won't error, it just won't change state — confirm the id is one you minted if you want to verify the row actually flips to revoked.
